_comment: Radiologist pool. Each entry has three keys -- email (the NewVue 'username' field, used as the STABLE identity for roster lookup / phone routing) and first_name / last_name (joined as 'Last, First' for human-readable display in SMS / Teams / Zoho ticket subjects). At the Introduced->Assigned transition the mock picks ONE entry at random and emits BOTH `assigned_radiologist` (= email, drives notification_targets.yaml lookup) AND `assigned_radiologist_display` (= 'Last, First') on the worklist row. To pin auto-assignment deterministically to one rad, shrink `radiologists` to a single-entry list. Pool files are hot-reloaded; no restart needed.
